Mechanism for re-checking after "Last Se:
To perform future searches/add to archive;
1.  Obtain a list of all publications in the archive or which were FOUND during search process (but excluded because of permissions).  To do this: alphabetically sort the "Obtained | InArchive" tab (and other relevant ones, like permission denied) of the "Publications" spreadsheet; copy the list of publications; use Excel to delete repetitions, to result in a list of all the individual publications included in archive and archive search process. Combine duplicate or merged publications into one search item (e.g. "Utica Observer" and "Utica Daily Observer")
2. List dates of published articles that were obtained for all publications in archive/archive search process.  Figure out what pubs. of those we have were obtained from print rather than digitized sources.  Check the list of all publications found against individual databases. 
3. Use this list of publications and dates to ascertain whether there are new digitized publications and/or dates in the databases.  If so, run a new search with existing search terms.
